name: harness.debug_spawn_item_inventory_target_state_audit_mcw
description: Audit one debug-spawn item primitive end-to-end under the proof-freeze rules: spawn a uniquely named item into inventory, prove the case-sensitive save/writeback gate, then require same-run saved-player metadata for the spawned item. This is harness primitive/process evidence, not product-feature proof.

steps.label: debug_spawn_electric_toothbrush_inventory
steps.preconditions: canonical dev-harness/McWilliams fixture is loaded and focused; debug spawn item primitive starts from the main map screen
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug spawn item helper returns to the live map after selecting electric toothbrush from the wish menu
steps.expected_immediate_state: one electric toothbrush should be added to live player inventory, but this row is only credited through the later same-run saved-player metadata gate
steps.failure_rule: debug menu wrong-screen, stale runtime, or missing saved-player toothbrush_electric metadata after save makes this debug-spawn row non-green
steps.next_step_gate: do not credit the debug-spawn primitive unless audit_saved_player_items_after_debug_spawn is green

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_debug_spawn_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after debug spawn and before the save/writeback request

steps.label: open_save_prompt_after_debug_spawn_item
steps.abort_reason: screen text did not prove the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt before confirming the debug-spawn save
steps.expected_visible_fact: the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt is open after the debug-spawn item step; confirmation must not be sent before this prompt is proven

steps.label: confirm_save_after_debug_spawn_item
steps.failure_rule: uppercase-Y confirmation is only trusted if the following saved-player mtime gate proves same-run writeback
steps.next_step_gate: saved-player item metadata may be credited only when audit_player_save_mtime_after_debug_spawn_save is green
steps.expected_visible_fact: the proven case-sensitive save prompt is confirmed with uppercase Y so the following mtime gate can prove same-run writeback

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_debug_spawn_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after confirming the debug-spawn save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed debug-spawn save, proving the following saved-player audit reads same-run state

steps.label: audit_saved_player_items_after_debug_spawn
steps.abort_reason: saved-player metadata did not contain the spawned toothbrush_electric item after same-run debug-spawn save/writeback
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved-player metadata contains toothbrush_electric after the debug-spawn item primitive
